flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Herzing University-Madison fell 41% between 2021 and 2024 (21.9% → 13.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Herzing University-Madison fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (45.5% → 39.7%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Herzing University-Madison fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (32.3% → 28.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Herzing University-Madison fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).
